channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 88 replies — 331.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 88 • Updated: 2026-03-03 23:38 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61921143
No such thing as a free lunch

61921144
>>61899833
none of these shitcoins are gonna do big movements again retard

61921169
>>61921144
No such thing as a free lunch

61921558
Just bought some more boys, let's go

61921644
>>61901257
This already rugged.

61921961
>>61921558
Ummm based?

61921988
>>61921644
Checked and true

61922004
kek turd killer still being shilled here in 2026
lmfao nice AI pics btw

61922014
>>61922004

61922070
>>61922004
You have 2 more weeks wagie

61922078
I hope you don’t buy toad

61922734
No one is buying toad in a shib thread! Shib is going to 14x to ath and toad will go to zero. Shib already has an etf coming and toad has desperate curry flavored shills. LMAO!

61923250
>>61922734
When toad moons YOU'RE going to seethe, when toad moons YOU'RE going to rope!

61923260
>>61899833
I am in anon, people are too stupid to skip this one.
And some Doge in case the elom makes a comeback.

61924787
>>61922734
See
>>61922014

61926036
>>61899833
This thread smells like curry and shit.

Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.

61926122
>>61926036
>This thread smells like curry and shit.
So like most threads on /biz ?

>>61926036
>Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.
Sure buddy. The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!

61927655
>>61926122
>The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!
i'm genuinely considering dumping the rest of what i hold because of this post

61927803
>>61927655
Checked dump it

61927812
>>61899833
you will be lucky to get a 3x

61927816
>>61927812
Shib is ez 10x bear case 33x bull case

61927892
>>61927816
Never happening

61928058
>>61927892
>Shib will never go to a place it’s been before because it just won’t.
You sound tarded bro

61928094
>>61928058
It only went there because of insane hype and FOMO. It will never happen again unless Elon makes it the official currency of X or something

61928421
>>61927655
Please do fud chud. I like cheapies.
>>61927812
>>61928094
He didn't buy cheap before the etf and clarity act passed.
>NGMI!

61929970
> shib niggers in this thread ignoring the most obvious 1000-3000x token right in front of them

61931432
>>61929970
Its no use anon. These people like being poor. Sit back and hodl and wait for the fireworks.

61931717
Shib is positive returns for evm daily trade bots. Over 60% positive returns. So far they’re all trading at above 50% positive returns for bot trading. What ever happened to shiba sex? Still a general.

61931779
This thread makes me so happy, I thought all my Shibros had abandoned /biz/ forever...we're back in full force!

61932425
While retards in the chat slurping a shitcoin that’s already over 5 years olde, the smart money is dropping at least .2 eff on toad, just sitting back watching the drama unfold

item.title: Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy — 39 replies — 156.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-03-03 23:53 UTC

OP

Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy

Early replies (first 3)

61931291
This is just a coon who doesn't understand investments and compounding returns.

61931302
>>61931288
Probably bought a bunch of houses and cars that he couldn't afford the maintenance and taxes on

61931311
>>61931302
>>61931291
>>61931288
He's right though

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61931384
>the kickers and punters end up being the richest NFL players after all is said and done

61931400
>>61931288
A billion isn't enough if you're going to live like a degenerate kingpin/try to keep up with the people who have literal infinitymoney (they're in charge of printing it)

61931445
nigga thought he could go full charlie sheen without charlie sheen money...even charlie sheen went broke

61931448
>>61931288
>100 million NW is not generational wealth
If you're a nigger even billions wont make a difference.
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Liberia

61931452
>>61931311
>flaunt
There it is. I don’t even know how you spend that much money outside of real estate.

61931673
>>61931452
>flaunters
Add it to the list

61931780
If a league pays a salary only because they have to, and is designed that once you’re no longer employed to “go broke” what is the real issue.

Look at the statistics unemployed professional athletes bankruptcy rate says one thing. Bankruptcy is part of the design.

61931805
he chose to get paid in bitcoin and it looks like that was a bad idea.

61931885
>>61931780
>Bankruptcy is part of the design.
>giving people millions of dollars is designed to make them bankrupt
do they point a gun at the nigs' heads and force them to buy mansions, bentleys, cookers, and rent out half of da club every weekend?

61931892
>>61931780
>pays a salary because they have to
As opposed to what, slavery?

61931960
>>61931384
Discarding the fact that they're 95% white and many are non americans they also typically have the longest careers. A problem most athletes have with money is that they have no long term vision because theyre still retarded kids and dont understand they wont make any more money after they get cut which is typically under 5 years so they live a millionaire lifestyle without a way to maintain it long term. For the special team players their paychecks will continue beyond their retarded 20s so theyll be able to be fine financially even if they waste most of their first contract. The long career also gives them them longer nfl healthcare. The healthcare extends 7 years beyond the end of your career so rivers and his 12 kids got to be be covered until 2032 by playing a few extra games this year

61931967
>>61931311
i dont watch niggerball. how does 5 year $100M contract turn into a 5 year $60M contract? the rest of his explanation makes sense: taxes, acting like a coon, etc.

61931992
>>61931967
It turns to $60m because of taxes and agents

61932006
>>61931288
>naaah nigguh I want that Lambo fuck your index fund

61932019
>>61931967
It's often line up with specific target goals the player has to make which is a hefty goal.
There goes another 20 million.
Then you have mandatory coach, manager and stadium fees.

61932020
>>61931992
it fucking doesn't lol

61932022
Saddest part is the teams and league hire a bunch of financial planning jews to prevent this. And the service is free. It's bad optics for their players to go bankrupt.
But naww man I aint need dat shit.

61932031
People who get CTE for a living probably don't make good investments

61932036
>>61932020
Agent takes $3m
Taxes takes $43.65m at 45%
That leaves him with $53.35m over 5 years

61932053
>>61932020
True, it's less.
Nigger must be forgetting the oxygen taxes.

61932058
That nigger can't even theorize what the difference between 30 million and 60 million would be, and neither can the average mutt. Just fucking park 40 million into CDs or bonds and you still make 1.6 million? Fuck even holding that much in silver since 2019 and he would've had a 5x on his stack.

Why do liberals love to hawk at successful entrepreneurs like bezos and musk for not eradicating poverty when niggers like this and billie eyelash gets a pass?

61932073
>>61931288
... if you are a nigger

61932140
>>61931288
How to become and stay rich

Step 1: don't be a retarded nigger

61932153
>>61931288
>His bank gifted him a car
What?

61932198
>>61931288
>famous TV negro goes broke
I'm going to guess he was doing 84mo loans on his Bugattis from native americans for 1000% APR, or some dumb nigger shit like that

61932440
>>61931311
>>61931288
he should have let his white masta manage his money for him, then he wouldnt be deal with these issue.

61932444
>>61931311
how else am i as a famous person going to hush all the women i raped and the minors i molested, as well as pay my lawer when this shit inevitably hits the fan?

61932449
>>61932020
It's less actually hes in the top bracket so 37% federal, 10% for new york, 3.7% for nyc that's over half his income stolen by the government before his agent gets his gibs

61932469
He made 1 million dollars a month. All he had to do was put half in an index fund. Use the other half to lease cars, rent a mansion and chimp out

61932474
>>61932469
btw he probably did commercials, and had sponsorships wtf lmao.

item.title: "Networking" is a waste of time — 26 replies — 104.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
"Networking" is a waste of time

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-03-03 23:54 UTC

OP

> If you try to network with the rich, they'll laugh at you and go back to their ballgame "DON'T TALK ABOUT WORK PLEASE!"
> Try to network within your friends or family, "Yeah sure I know such and such and they'll let you know!" and you never hear anything back again
> Go to job fairs; "THANK YOU FOR YOUR RESUME! *shakes your hand* YOU CAN APPLY ONLINE AT WWW....NEXT!!!"

Where's the REAL advice on how to make money for once, outside of the memes "get a job" (which btw there are no real entry level jobs anymore) or "just gamble bro" (and end up in the 90%+ lost money statistic).

Sigh.

Early replies (first 3)

61930524
>>61930491
You join forces with other 4channers at a meetup in Miami.

61930527
>>61930491
true

61930539
>>61930491
anon, networking is a euphemism for "sucking cock". You want a job but have little to no experience? go to a bingo night for the elderly. Find the most homosexual old boomer faggot you can find and flirt with him. Be clear adn direct: I'll suck your cock for a job or penetrate you at your whim. Please. Then you land the job. You never noticed Bingo nights are full of 20 year old femboys flirting with old men. Of coarse not, you won't be asking retarded questions about networking here otterwise

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61930630
>>61930491
As head of recruitment, I don't bother with interviewing potential employees. I throw them into a trial networking event and observe how they react. Stiff, stuffy, scared? No thanks. If you don't finish the event energised, at least a dozen business cards in your hand, you're not the candidate for us.

61930680
>>61930491
Networking is for students and extroverts. Go to higher education and go to all the parties. The old boy network is real.

61930745
>>61930630
Why even LARP about this like what’s your reasoning?

61930769
>>61930524
tell me more

61930781
>>61930630
stfu u fake the way to win a networking event is fine one company there that has one or two people who are interested in you. but networking job fairs etc are all scams. the only way in is to lie on your resume like everyone else.

61930871
>>61930491
Networking is great if you're hot. I'm very attractive, athletic and can phone in charisma if I need to (Im socially awkward otherwise).

the rub is you need to be fit, dress well and have an aura to yourself. Want women? Be hot. Want money? Be hot. It's that simple, just be attractive. I think everyone has some control over this in some sense. You need charisma, but you can get away with having less of it if you're hotter but if you have both you will see lots of benefits. That has been my experience. I hate networking but I want to be rich so I need to get back on the horse and get out there again...

61930897
>>61930524
Im in Miami there's no one there who knows anything about this place

61930957
>>61930769
>>61930897
I just think there should be a secret meetup of 4channers at a Hilton in Miami. Pick the date, but don't give a time or exact meetup point. Then have a special color or code to signal you are a fellow 4channer.

Then we can truly discuss business and start building an empire.

61931017
>>61930957
I've done this, you don't have to be secretive about it. Feds will find it anyway, just don't make the point of the group political action and you'll be fine. With enough anons you can do anything.

61931411
Networking is an euphemism for sex work. It really means free blow jobs or handjobs.

61931421
>>61930491
Did you fall for the not going to college and joining a frat meme?

61931459
>>61930491
it's overrated. if you're just quiet and keep your head down, you'll be able to blow the whistle on all the "networking" going on when the time is right.

61931535
>>61931017
I mean literally for business. 4chan bans actually business collaboration on the board for some reason.

61931936
>>61931535
4chan is the place to signal meets either offline (preferred) or in a more private location (chat). It's not a place for organizing anything serious.

61931991
I've spent so much time building infrastructure in 100% independence to where my independent lifestyle compounds on itself. I'm too powerful and scare the Network Gen Xer with the audacity of my existence being a thing.

61932160
>>61931991
Take this mindset, and add that everyone else is expendable. You don't need to network.

61932381
>>61930491
It'll come to you, you have to figure it out on your own. Just watch the way shit works and it'll become clear.

If you don't have high IQ then you're ngmi

61932389
>>61931936
No one on 4chan is your friend. Anyone you "meet" here is a glownigger who wants to rape you and throw you in federal prison for the rest if your life so they can pin some shit on you that you simply cannot defend against.
This is not the place for making friends, it's the place for exchanging ideas and pondering things.

61932435
>>61930491
Are you ugly?

61932468
Networking is just making friends dumbass. You don’t try to network, your network emerges naturally

61932475
join the masons

61932476
>>61930491
"networking" is just non drug addicts exchanging phone numbers and complimenting each other's chubby wives

61932478
>>61932389
why would a glownigger bother trying to pin shit on a bunch of broke NEETs and send them to prison?

item.content:encoded:

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61928612
>>61928605

61928617
>>61928612

holy kek based Methuselah

61928622
silvers going to 0 even though its the rarest shiniest most important periodic element unlike bitstein

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61928625
Something you were warned about for weeks. Silver is a shitcoin, a highly manipulated shitcoin under the control of the most powerful people on earth. You thought you were going to get rich playing in some one else's casino?

61928626
>>61928617
Gravity is a bitch i know. kek silver baggies.

61928637
>>61928626
It would be sad to watch if only silver baggies weren't the most obnoxious shitstains to ever disgrace this board. They are going to hold this bag for at least a decade, possibly multiple.

61928653
>>61928625
Jane street has joined the manipulation game recently, Its so ogre

>How do silver xisters cope ?

>>61928637
Maybe. bearish divergence can form on higher time frames and have a low spike before sending price higher that the previous high. So time will tell.

61928658
>>61928653
I look like the blahaj basedlita on the left

61928663
sõylita

61928706
>>61928653
Nah. You got a nearly 50% drop after a multi decade high. Its just a textbook short squeeze into blow off top. Its just math and gravity. If by some miracle you get one more leg up, you're still coming back down afterwards, and none of you will take profit in the event anyway. You've all deluded yourself in "new paradigm" cope narratives and retarded cope fantasies, which is why you spend 99% of your time seething about crypto when you're not posting your rock collection and facebook memes once a day on /pmg/

61928743
>>61928706
at least when bitcoin crashes to $5k you can cash out for an exit tank

61928861
>>61928706
You would know we seethe about fiat which is exactly why we're not going to 'take profit' in paper

61932151
>>61928605
bump

61932162
The kids these days would call that "not bussin on kirk"

61932258
>>61928706
Kek based, silver baggies blown the fuck out

61932453
Time to buy more

item.title: Getting into IT/Programmer workfield — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Getting into IT/Programmer workfield

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-03 23:53 UTC

OP

I'm 22, and I live in turkey. I've been working with my family past 4 years, but I realized we don't get along mostly, so I want to look for a new job. I did mostly accounting when I was working. I want to get into programming, I used to type programs in high school and went to a course of it but didn't. finished it. I could study for college here but most of universities here are shit and don't promise any future. Should I self learn some code knowledge and look for a job afterwards? or look for an uni outside of Turkey? I'm not sure. I don't want to work for pennies I have no experience of anything basically. I'm open for advice

Early replies (first 3)

61932443
>>61932356
It's a hyper saturated field where junior programmers are rapidly being replaced by AI thanks to C-suite retards, so I wouldn't recommend it. For the time being, I'd seek qualification in some area that can't easily be replaced. The world is on the brink of a major war, so this is the time to prioritise job security.

61932456
IT is probably easier than trying to get into programming, at least in the current times. I got into the industry by getting certifications. I do not have a degree. Which certifications you get depends on what specific IT role you want to have. Do a lot of research about the different roles in IT and then tailor yourself to that role. I am a network guy, I would personally reccomend the CCNA, Network+, and Security+ to start out with if that's what you want to do. If you wanted to be a Sysadmin or something else, you would get certs related to that. Knowing how to speak English is a big plus especially if you end up working for a large company.

61932473
Never been a better time to try. Go get your feet wet, lad! You got this!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: WOAH What year is it where am I? /biz/?? when did they add an iz? — 95 replies — 57.4/hr

were off to a great start

61917585

Salvia officinalis in fields

61917849

61918416
great thread. i miss /b/.

61918426

61918486

61918948
>>61906370

61918968

It’s a cesspit now. Dont even look. Man I’m 46! Where did the time go.

61920110
>>61918968
dang unc, go outside

61920123
Great thread, man.

61920179
>>61906449
>oopsie
winrar

61920392
>>61906370
efg go up. ascend into higher realms of meme existence

61920744
>>61907301
if the world just ended in 2016 we'd be a lot better off
nothing has been good since then

61921246
>>61906387
Kek'd irl

>>61906426
>>61906431
LOL

61921344
>>61906458
It still is. Ever seen that image of the Chinese kid with a boot on his head, then the next image shows that his arm was in the boot? That's you. You can take the boot off your head and laugh at anytime.

61924708
>>61906449
kys

61924733
>>61924708
lol

61924820
samefag

61925046
hell yeah brother

hh

61925061
I'm glad I got to enjoy this bread

61925959
I beg God every day to take me back 20 years.

61926168
>>61906370
What did xhe mean by this, businessandfinancesisters?

61926678
>>61906370
Thank you OP

61927008
so uhhhhhhhhh, bottom October 2027 instead of 2026?

61927064
>>61920110
you are here forever!

61927482
>>61906449
kek this see you in 2028

61927492
>>61906370
Fucking THANK YOU. YES

>>61915797
Same but '05, fren. Genuinely happy to see some of us still around

61932148
>>61906370

item.title: Food is so cheap it is practically free. — 112 replies — 45.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Food is so cheap it is practically free.

Open thread • Replies: 112 • Updated: 2026-03-03 21:26 UTC

OP

The image posted is in AUD, but for those in the US, Lets assume an hourly wage of $15.

$15 USD in the US can buy 25lbs of rice. which is 45,000 calories. that is astounding.

I work minimum wage (AUS) and after 2 hours of work I can afford an entire weeks worth of food.

the first hour affords me actually nearly a months worth of carbohydrate energy (rice, pasta and potato's)

The second hour affords me 3kg of meat. which is more than enough protein for a week.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Staple_food

very helpful link to understand there is actually not that much food in the entire world to eat for bulk calories/nutrition. there is about 7 different foods to eat. (wheat, rice, corn, potato, meat, dairy and bananas/plantains in certain regions, honorable mention for beans and lentils as well.)

Early replies (first 3)

61926835
People think they're too good for rice and beans, supplemented with fresh vegetables. They deserve to be poor. For the price of two colas you can buy an entire bag of beans which will feed you for weeks. Stop eating corposlop made in a lab that's marked up 10000%, eat real food.

61926840
>>61926822
>eating is so cheap when you eat like a 13th century

61926847
>>61926822
>food is so heckin cheap when you eat like a medieval Chinese peasant!
>updoots to the left!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61927747
>>61926840
>>61926847
Rice with chicken and beans is infinitely more nutritious than Mcdonalds. Cry about it you are weak. Cheap food cooked well is the most beneficial.

61927938
>>61926835
>rice and beans, supplemented with fresh vegetables
this and tuna/deenz+salad is top tier cuisine
As a student I survived so well on this. Best food ever.

61928034
>>61927193
Soil has no very little to do with nutrients. Genetics of the plant has more control over nutrients, so the long lasting bland food that was bred to be that way is the problem. Having regional markets and actual seasons for strains of vegetables that taste good and don't have a long shelf life would contribute to having more nutrients in food.

61928068
>>61926848
Mountain Dew

61928075
>>61926822
>>61926835
Holy fuck. Irredeemably delusional.
Eating only rice and beans like one day you will wake up and have a meltdown about why you did that stupid overly frugal living shit to yourself. That is not gonna be a good day.

61928215
>>61926822
the chemicals and fake meat in Mcmuttslop are literal poison, at least in europe they force these evil fucks to make real food

61928231
>>61926822
Okay great, doesn't matter though when rent is your largest expense by a huge margin

61928338
>>61926867
fpbp

61928341
>>61926867
6 billion pajeets and gooks suggest otherwise

61928406
>>61926822
>calories

Amazing maths there. I better start drinking sunflower oil instead of eating food - that has twice the calories of rice! Just 11lbs of that already beats your 45000 calories bag of rice. Astounding

61928427
>>61926835
>vegetables
anything that isn't potatoes/carrot/cabbage/onion is expensive

61928442
>>61926822
>>61926835
>>61926870
Based. Most first world people just don't have any frugal skills. They fall for the consumer slop and blame there low wage for being broke.

61928596
>>61928075
You don't need to eat beans and rice, you can eat egg rice with minced meat, that's cheap as shit too. Or something like potato with fried chicken. Or Caesar salad. All things you can easily make yourself that cost very little

61928700
>>61926822
McDonalds is garbage
Rice has no nutrition

61928746
>>61927442
Fair enough if you want me to be completely specific, because it really impossible to consume muscle meat without consuming fat, it is always connected unless you are a freak that cuts it off.
But to concede semantics, you need the muscle meat and associated fat, in a ratio of around 70-30 more or less respectively. Organs aren't required, they are nutritious, sometimes overly nutritious to a toxic level in excess.
I don't eat them mainly because they taste nasty. My bones aren't disintigrating, my muscles still grow stronger through training, my shits are 100 times better than before and I have no debilitating chronic diseases. N =1 but it just works.
To keep it /biz/ related, this diet is incredibly cheap and simple and still satiating and appetizing, and I can't recommend it enough. It won't be as cheap as beans and rice but also you won't be sick, constipated, low energy, brain fogged, skinny fat grain slave that ends up spending 200k in hospital bills and medicines.
I spend $400 a month on food, but I do get the much more expensive grass fed ground beef and special cuts from a local farm because I can afford it. If you are in a pinch, those 70/30 beef tubes from walmart could easily get you to survive with minimal effort and probably only $150 a month or so.

61928773
>>61928700
Rice is ok. I wasted way too much of my life studying biochemistry.

Its kinda shit to have incomplete proteins with low bioavailability. You want to have like 1 gram per pound of bodyweight of protein per day. Ideally Cysteine & Taurine.

Look into the cuts of meat we stopped eating in like the late 1800s/early 1900s, these ones are cheap and actually have what we need

61928775
>>61926835
>People think they're too good for rice and beans,
yes, I am rich.

61928813
>>61926822
it's never been easier to avoid eating slop because as well as raising the prices so much food companies also have degraded the quality of ingredients in many snacks and processed foods so they don't taste good anymore.

61928855
>>61927677
retard, carbs are key for energy and recovery, you just have to learn to eat the right amount at the right time, 100g rice 2-3 hours before lifting, 40g rice after lifting to restore glycogen stores, lower carbs at dinner, etc…

61928879
>>61928855
>retard, carbs are key for energy and recovery,
(in your opinion)
after a few months of adaptation, 0 carb btfo carb loading in virtually every single scenario, along with other added benefits. Carbs are just trash. Even animals that eat only plants like cows convert their food into fatty acids through fermentation.

61928887
>>61928773

My go to lunch bowl is rice + eggs + peas (or something else). Very cheap and basically macronutritionally complete.

61928919
>>61926822
>t. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_pDTiFkXgEE

61930720
Feds on 4chan teaching chuds how to cook to prevent collapse wasn't on my 2026 bingo card

61930744
For me, it's oats. They contain:
>Magnesium (muscle and nerve function)
>Iron (oxygen transport)
>Zinc (immune health)
>B vitamins (energy metabolism)
>Manganese (bone formation, metabolism)
>Protein (more than most grains)
>Contains avenanthramides (unique antioxidants in oats)

61930997
As a Dutchman for me it's potatoes, meat, vegetables.

61931628
>sis just eat 2 kg of rice and beans
you're not only paying for calories, you're paying for how compact they are

61931776
>>61926835
Blessed.

61931835
Damn som not even paella?

61931883
>>61926835
They hate you because you speak the truth

61931942
>>61926822
someone actually wrote this whole post

item.title: Passive Money Farming / Side Hustles While on the Clock — 48 replies — 38.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Passive Money Farming / Side Hustles While on the Clock

Open thread • Replies: 48 • Updated: 2026-03-03 22:39 UTC

OP

>Have an easy office job
>Mostly just scroll on my phone
>Literally just do barely anything and make salary
>Realize I could make money in my phone during this time
>Start making AI art, get up to $100 a month from subs
Anyone aware of something that could make more than this and is primarily done on your phone. I do not mind doing it on my PC at home too, as I already do this with AI stuff For now, AI is easy enough and extra money is extra money but more cash flows will always be better
Note, I want actual income, not “Just sell options on your phone while at your job bro”

Early replies (first 3)

61924922
So basically asian tits make me straight haha

61924932
I'm considering getting a 3d printer farm plus I know how to work with the files and make custom things but idk seems effort

61924936
>>61924922
I’m happy for you anon

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61925705
>>61924882
i fucking NEED a gf this hot
how do i do it ? money? looksmaxing?
please someone tell me how

61925774
>>61925705
All you’re going to notice is that boobs are just blobs of fat that smell like fat and look way better than they feel. Also the woman will naturally be rather unimpressed by anything because of how hot she sees herself.

61925778
>>61925705
She's not hot, she just has big tits

61925779
>>61925564
Don't ever say dumb shit like that ever again. Lack of money destroys even the strongest love.

61925806
>>61924882
Making money off of a phone alone just means you are a content creator. Which is a viable side hustle if you have charisma and/or skills and knowledge. Everyone wants a job where they make money with their phone so try something else.

And it's nice having a big titty wife.

61925811
>>61924882
I must rub my cock on a traditionally conservative nubile large breasted Nippon whore

61925831
>>61925774
i dont care all women are whores anyway so i might as well have a hot big titted gf
>>61925778
you are either a homosexual or a jealous roastie

61925844
>>61925705
>>61925774
You don't NEED one anon. Remember you will find no peace with a "hot" woman. Every guy even your friends will be constantly trying to fuck her or messaging her. This will keep you in a state of perpetual paranoia and misery. Hot women are mostly unhinged and mentally unstable. They expect you to do everything in the relationship while offering very little in return. Probably boring unenthusiastic sex too. She will most likely abuse you in the relationship because she sees you as wasting her time when she could be out fucking other chads and gaining maximum attention for her herself. Hot women are out for themselves they know that they have millions of thirsty guys who will fuck them, and they will make you aware of that every day.

61925851
>>61925663
great post

61925903
>>61925806
I'm thinking of side hustle streaming and photography while travelling amerilard on trailer but doing so would require some investment

61925909
>>61925844
nigger i did the average girl route for 10+ years already both roads lead to the same destination at least with the hot girl you get to enjoy it while it lasts

61925926
>>61924922
Asians don't count as straight.

61925995
>>61925844
>>61925909
hot women are also extremely boring and shallow since they don't need to develop social skills

61925999
>>61925995
Wow they're just like me then.

61926357
>>61925508
patreon? how do people pay for ai anime girls

61926427
>>61925508
Based. I've been making some good money with 3D Asians. My IG has been blowing up recently with followers.

61926854
>>61925663
Thanks for the rundown
I’m fairly content and have a friend who is making more so if I can scale to 150 or 200 monthly that’s really not bad all things considered

61926904
>>61926427
Brother what the holy hell is this

61926915
I didn't read shit bitch. I just saw tits.

61926931
>>61926904
Slop that's been going viral and blowing up my social media.

61927004
>>61926931
seems a bit sus but go off

61928037
>>61926931
you're not making real money posting this shit on Instagram. Fuck off thirdie

61929784
>>61924932
You can make a shitload of money printing Glock switches for ghetto niggers in Chicongo.

61931922
>>61925650
There's a lot of youtube videos teaching women how to make their own candles and soap
>>61926427
what do you sell the followers after giving them big titties?

61931935
>>61924922
that’s gay

61932089
Investing is the best "side hustle" and its not even close. My investments made me 2.7x my annual salary last year and this year I'm already at 90% of my salary just 2 months in. You aren't going to make that kind of money selling candles on etsy or prompting ai fetish porn for degenerates.

61932102
>>61932089
I do invest
I want more cash because ultimately it should provide more money compared to chasing returns

61932125
>>61924882
be a prostidude for blind women, and since they can't see, you can stream yourself fucking them on chaturbate and twitch (just use ai overlays to make it non-explicit). that's how i made my first 10 million

61932217
>>61932089
How do you invest?

61932227
>>61932089
those are some sweet flippers

item.title: /pmg/ Pirates Metals Goblins — 70 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
/pmg/ Pirates Metals Goblins

Open thread • Replies: 70 • Updated: 2026-03-03 21:57 UTC

OP

ARR!

Early replies (first 3)

61926222
yarrr

61926235
>>61926222
arr har har harr! get ye telescope and check this shipmate!

61926254
Arrgh matey, IQCHADJEETs Silva stock bussin nigga frfr on kirk nigga

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61928867
>>61928826
I would be surprised if the market was open on Purim in any western city. Or was it the shabbos goys in lambskin aprons doing it? Because "Dude! Blood Moon!".

61928870
>>61928841
Paper is cheaper than physical because you have to pay 20% premiums,,,,people who buy physical are broke retards on k_rk

61928874
Afternoon m8ys
Excellent to see the Captain back at the helm.

61928884
>>61928841
>Only paper silver pumps and dumps like a shit coin.

Talking about shitcoins good Ol' Black Rock one of the biggest real estate assets collectors is starting to liquidate its Bitcoin assets. Doesn't seem like it's a good year to be a crypto bro.

61928922
>>61928867
Blood moon, im gonna COOM!

61928930
>>61928870
The premiums are normally lower. When things are unstable they get very high.

>>61928848
I am talking about $10+ pumps and dumps happening in a single day. That is not natural. If this dropped $15 dollars in a month it would be believable. But you can't even do that because of real supply and demand for silver. And everyone can see when the big dumps happen and figure out who is doing it based on time zone. Cartels killing Mexican miners and silver bombs being dropped on Iran is now added onto your cheap silver tamping problems.

61928997
>>61928930
You're forgetting about Jane Street recently becoming one of the biggest Silver Futures holder right now. You know, the same one being investigated by India and China.

https://coinpedia.org/news/why-is-silver-falling-jane-streets-1-3b-slv-bet-sparks-manipulation-debate/
https://www.reuters.com/world/india/jane-street-deposits-567-million-escrow-accounts-per-india-regulatory-directives-2025-07-14/
https://archive.is/wip/dCGDy

Fuckers are even beating Black Rock. Trying to apply technical analysis to this market while fun is ultimately an exercise in futility if you don't know all of its key players suppressing the price. The only good position in Silver is owning it physically.

61929008
>>61928997
>The only good position in Silver is owning it physically.


The choice of broke retards,,,,no thanks shill

61929016
>>61928930
>Cartels killing Mexican miners and silver

The price dropped $20 yall said this would make it go up $30,,,,lmao yall learned nothing and still claim to nostradamus

61929416
>>61929008
Most of us bought years ago. Myself included. (And yes I did sell a few ounces when it was over $80 a while ago.) The rest are people willing to buy at a loss or are retards. I am here to watch for fun. You are not stressing me out. I wait for Comex to be found empty with glee.

61929468
>>61929416
>And yes I did sell a few ounces when it was over $80 a while ago.
absolutely no shame in that. It's quite literally what silver is for. You buy it when the price is low, build up your stack, and once the GSR closes down like it did recently you sell off no more than half of your stack and convert the FIAT you receive into free gold.
Holding silver forever hoping it will make you rich one day is the same as buying bitcoin nowadays and hoping for the same.
Rinse and repeat.

61929486
About to try and get a refund from TD, been 36 business days and no confirmation of my 4 bars being shipped. They’re gonna try and say some final sale bullshit, but they’ve not held up their part of the “contract”. I stupidly grabbed 5 one ounce silver maples 2 weeks ago, might try to lump that in with the refund (x to doubt for this part being refund) cause I could just run and slurp those 5 locally for same price I paid on TD. Inb4 I get the refund and silver moons before I get the cash back in my account to go buy at my LCS

61929507
I considered selling a little silver for gold recently but quite like that Clive Thompson characters approach if at least waiting for 30to one instead of 50plus. It's nice to have a little pike of silver anyway even if I prefer gold. So atm I'll jyst dca more

61929573
>>61929468
Didn't sell my gold. Not buying gold right now. Maybe in a few years I will buy some bling. Waiting for stock market cheapies and pampering myself this month. Thanks occult retards. You are so predictable. It is fun to find out how many of you blackmailed ziontards own shares stocks I still hold.

61929582
>>61929573
please rewrite that in English and without the schizobabble

61929747
>>61929582
People who got rich have multi generational wealth spend money to cause things to fulfil prophesies because they are bored. It works until people catch on and can figure out when they buy and sell stuff. Purim blood moon at 3:33 AM PST? Massive sell off. Sell some of your stocks and before that day especially institutional investor heavy stocks. Then wait for cheapies in things you were eyeing. Just bought a share of an oil stock that dumped. Makes no sense that it would dump when it was showing the start of a long slow upward trajectory before a classic bull run. And that was before the Iran thing. Oil stock are hardly dumping because they shouldn't be. Aware people are buying today while they dump good stocks for no apparent reason because of dumb rituals. I will wait much longer for other things. I know this could go on for years.

61929770
>>61926208
Anyone else remember AYY lmao coin anon?
Had to sell all his coins because of a family emergency like 2 years ago

I still think about this alien coins he had some fucking cool shit
Poor fucker missed the pump

61929916
>>61929486
Anyone ever tried or had luck with refunding from TD precious metals? Shithawking the chart before I send off my email, knowing today it’ll pull some Talmud magic and moon when I ask for a refund/get refunded

61930008
>>61926208
4 March 2027, we meet and see who has the last laugh. You confident?

61931300
>>61930008
2027? absolutely. but you should be in a bunker by then.

61931346
>>61928874
never left, glad to see you too shipmate
>>61928544
this shipmate knows the course.
>>61928696
would buy that coin if i saw it in a shop, gave me a hearty har har!

61931497
kek baggies

61931541
This shit is too jewed, I'm going back to trading natural gas

61931566
kek shaggies

61931581
>>61931541
>fiat brain

61931664
>>61931497
>>61931541
^land lubbers

61931697
OP I have been enjoying your in-character Long John Silver posts.

61931715
>>61931697
it be the way of a pirate, t'be sure. make merry and enjoy life! especially when there be plunder to be had booty to be hoarding! nothing be warming the heart like the glow of gold from within me chest, ARR!

61931989
>>61931715

I've restocked the Flying Dutchman Captain

item.title: Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. — 19 replies — 27.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted.

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-03-03 23:12 UTC

OP

Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.

Instead Chainlink keeps the scam going for years and years, with new "partnerships" and "news" and "integrations", all while the token does nothing. They give just enough breadcrumbs to keep the baggies holding on desperately for a pump, and they probably keep buying even more LINK tokens as well ensuring they remain poor forever as they wait for a "mega moon" that never comes.

In that way it's actually a more brutal and evil scam, but still funny. It's crazy because all they had to do was buy Bitcoin... or gold, or the S&P 500, or literally anything else.

Early replies (first 3)

61931782
fuck all stinkies :}
hate em all hate em all
think they SUUUUCK xD

61931907
>>61931684
>At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.
Wait a minute. You're telling me I've DCA'd into a scam all these years?

61931931
thanks for keeping this a Chainlink board

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61931939
>>61931782
With comments like these biz should really be renamed to /trash.
Is this supposed to be funny?

61931956
>>61931684
Just glad we can all have a good laugh about it.

61931958
>>61931939
hi there triggered stinkie :}
we see you

61931976
>>61931907
well, you've learned how to dca, next step is to actually buy something worthwhile, like dogshit or bankrupted towel stock

61931997
>>61931976
don't forget GME :} the list of shit that is superior to even link is endless

61932038
>>61931958
Just keep doing what your doing. Sit in your chair in the corner and keep informing me of my financial performance on an hourly basis so that I dont need to open up the app. Thanks.

61932060
This site is shit now. I'm on here less and less. What a rubbish thread. Twitter completely ate /biz's lunch.

61932062
>>61931684
what's the deal with the LINK obsession? there are hundreds of bad cryptos to invest in, like every single one of them. why the singling out? reads like a psyop.

61932076
>>61932038
ok

61932086
>>61932062
Because linkies were smug. They fudded their own token endlessly to keep normies away from making it. We had to spend years listening to their grandiose scenarios, their $81k prediction and their lack of self awareness. Now linkies will spend years listening how bad they failed. Their hubris was their fall. Adem won.

61932119
>>61932062
>reads like a psyop.
/biz is a psyop board ran by banking cartel flunkies, anything that gets fudded here I assume is a threat to the bank niggers and I dive in out of spite

61932122
>>61932086
this
we fuddies are the warriors of justice
we will see to it that the linkie hubris is punished for all eternity
might i remind you all that one of link's first memes was "are nolinkers even human?"

61932285
>>61932086
ill agree with this in about 10 more years if link never hits 100

for the next 10 years ill buy link tho. should pump to 11 some day ,

61932295
yikes

61932298
chainlink will be sub $5 this year. let that sink in.

61932327
>>61932298
If it does I will put usd 5 million in, just to spite you, you insufferable fuck. Ffs. Give it a rest.

item.title: Hyperliquid >decentralized perp and spot exchange >trading silver, gold and crude oil on weekends during a war >genius l… — 42 replies — 22.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Hyperliquid >decentralized perp and spot exchange >trading silver, gold and crude oil on weekends during a war >genius l…

Open thread • Replies: 42 • Updated: 2026-03-03 22:02 UTC

OP

Hyperliquid

>decentralized perp and spot exchange
>trading silver, gold and crude oil on weekends during a war
>genius level founders. Harvard, MIT and caltech.
>no vc funding from day 1
>31% geneis airdop tokens to users minting millionaires for early usrs.
>97% all platfrom fees spent and buy HYPE tokens from open market and sent to burned wallet.


Holding HYPE is comfy AF

Early replies (first 3)

61918612
>>61918597
Buy an ad.
CLEAN IT UP JANNIES

61918623
>>61918597
>Shilled by literally all of Twitter fags including scammers like Arthur
>Token not needed
Yeah, no.

61918628
>>61918623
why don't people say "stock not needed". its a crypto company and the coin is basically the stock.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61919376
Fuck hyperliquid, they forced cz the good guy to giganuke the market (like he did in 2022 to destroy ftx/sbf), but these fuckers are still alive.
They need to disappear so cz can allow the market to recover.

61919383
>>61919376
I don't hold any hype but I use the exchange on a daily basis and it works better than even centralized exchanges. It's the best product out there.

61919391
>>61919354
Yes. Hype is used as gas on the HyperEVM chain.

There are two chains in Hyperliquid ecosystem.

HyperCore - trading engine. No gas needed. Pay with trading fees which is used to buy and burn HYPE.

HyperEVM - smart-contract layer. HYPE used as bas.

61920112
I was thinking about grabbing a bag in late Jan and then it pumped again. Serves me right for wanting to buy this under 20 burgerbux

61920124
>>61920112
Same, bro. I just hold btc and trade on hyperliquid. I wanted to get myself a good back of hype, it's the best project out there and the team are not niggers. They want hype to go up. This weekends pump is because everybody is using it to trade crypto and commodities.

One of the few chains that is actually used. No marketing, no bullshit kantian philosophy or any kind of german idealism talk like Sergey or Charles hoskinson

61920169
How do I even buy Hype in the US? I need to use a VPN?

61920469
>>61919376

61920537
can i trade spot btc on there?

61920572
>>61920537
yes. Crypto, stocks, commodities... both spot and perps

61920574
Forex too

61921651
>>61920169
it's on Coinbase now starting Feb 2026. Not sure if it's available in USA.

VPN is very useful. expressvpn

61921686
Funny , this thread popped up because hype's about the moon

61921966
>>61918612
tell that to bloomberg you stupid nigger

61921981
>>61918623
>hurr im not going to buy this multi-billion marketcap token because [insert random person i dont like] is in it!!!
You are thinking like a pleb here and will simply miss out on profits this way.

61922017
>>61918597
I only have 250 hype and refuse to buy up here. It has to retrace back to the low 20's at some point.

Also shilling hype here is a waste. This entire board is so underwater on their bags they're in the mariana trenches.
>Link generals
>Avi generals
>BBBY/GME

I said this to myself earlier this year but Jeff and Vitalik are truly the last 2 people in this entire fucking space that still hasn't soul their souls yet

61922034
>>61921981
Look up GMX.

61924490
Sigh
These poor souls

61924506
edgex is better

61924534
>>61921981
why would he want to buy something that is already multibillions?

61924803
>>61918597
>sent to burned wallet.

why are you lying? the tokens arent burned, they are kept in their treasury

they probably will never have a need to touch those tokens, but they arent burned

61924887
>>61918707
So, the gas is, on a direct level paid in USDC. This is why you one-time sign, and can trade without having to sign each time, unlike GMX. Your trading fees are gas.
These trading fees are used to buy & burn hype. That's why the exchange is a fee collecting engine, and purchasing a share in said engine is by buying hype, which also serves as governance.

Also /biz/ is retarded these days, one-shotted by chainlink and not knowing about anything outside of the cult bubble.

61924972
>>61918597
>source, closed

61926502
>>61922017
it literally broke 20 in the january drop , it should be unhindered to high 40s or 50 into a quick retest of idk 35ish into ath or just straight to 60 over some weeks/months.

61926525
>>61924803
it's 2026. Ask AI about HYPE burn address and stop making shit up.

61927011
>>61926502
Nah this is moonboy posting. The regulatory and closed source fud are real and people are quick to point to the 11 man team making trillions of revenue a year as a bullish moat when any logical investor sees that as a massive target for competitors.

The team at least recognizes this hence the $28 million funding a lobbying team for US compliance. But on a strict regulatory angle Lighter edges Hype out simply due to the fact they're structured from the ground up as a US company on top of their VC connections

61927038
>>61927011
must be great for the lighter shareholders

61929634
>>61927011
The VC connections are precisely the problem with Lighter. Half the damn supply belongs to the team and VCs. Less than 3k people hold this shit and most of the circulating supply is in the top 10. Only 25% of supply is circulating. FDV is through the roof and it's done nothing but dump since it was launched. Once it's -85% it might be worth a look but not before

61930154
>>61918597
It’s got only another 10x left in it, 30x if generalized vm takes off
Bretty good with size
I will buy a bag if I see it trading near $15 later this year

61931112
>>61926525
yea i see, in dec they voted to treat the system address as a burn address and never touch it.

still not technically burned, but functionally burned as long as another vote doesnt pass to loot the wallet(which isnt possible with a proper burn)

anyone know a proper site to track daily burns?

61932072
hype is a good buy
but don't delude yourself, it's not decentralized, it's not trying to be either

61926626
>>61924270

61927505
>>61924479
>>61924674
Iran has spent the past 30 years preparing for this day, for them it's existential, it's the reason they wanted nukes. They may ultimately be destroyed but they are not going to surrender or show restraint.

61928137
>>61924190
One month special military operation

61928146
>>61924237
>if the oil industry collapses

61928151
>>61924190

61928154
>>61928151

USA LOSS THE WAR

61928163

61931180
>>61924190

61931265
>>61926626

61931328
>>61924674
They didn't even get the 2nd guy. They got none of the most key people in Iran other than Khamenei - Arafi, Ejei, Larijani, Pezeshkian, Ghalibaf.

61931914
>>61924412
And you would be right, kek.
>When pressed on his plans for a transition of power, Mr. Trump said he hoped Iran’s elite military forces — including hardened officers of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps who have held substantial influence and profited from the existing regime — would simply turn over their weapons to the Iranian populace.
>“They would really surrender to the people, if you think about it,” he said.

61931961
>>61924190
Trump fatigue is so fucking real. Like an obnoxious ex texting you.

61919240

61919350
>>61918275

the CEO will get his big cut only at $83 dollar share price MINIMUM.
look at warner bros that shit went from below $10 to now beeing baught at $30

61919773
>>
https://hedgefollow.com/stocks/PYPL

61921315
>>61919350
I doubt it will go that high.

61923340
>>61923318

61923342
>>61923340

61925981
>>61904727
At the rate they were going, it wasn't going to be a big acquisition, merely a ripple on the pond

61926795
AMZN

61927102
Can someone explain why Paula even exists?? I remember you needed it for eBay back when everything was new. Somehow it morphed into the default asking to payment

61928616
>>61927102
It exists because easy cc payment processor services didn't exist for a long time. You used to give your cc info directly to the web vendors at payment, which eventually got people scammed on shady websites. Paypal was the first of its kind there. The internet has somehow COMPLETELY forgotten that money used to be a complete pain in the ass to move around. Btc, being somewhat clunky now, was actually a huge move in being able to transfer money without oversight or other friction overhead. Now that its been incorporated into the collectivist panopticon, both btc and PayPal are harder to use than just years ago

61930361
ooooooooooooooooooooooooooo

61931059
46,75$
+2,75%

item.title: WHAT WAS THE POINT OF THE PRECIOUS METALS FAD? — 13 replies — 16.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHAT WAS THE POINT OF THE PRECIOUS METALS FAD?

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-03 23:06 UTC

OP

Now that the dust has settled, PMs were all rugged and rock collectors are back to holding bags under the mountain, can we all agree that this entire PM fad was entirely dumb?

Gold and silver achieved nothing besides under-leveraging bitcoin and leading to unecessary panic liquidations as whales swapped BTC for rocks. The reason why PMs even rose in value to instigate such curiosity if they'd be the next bitcoin was probably China, Russia and Brazil making simultaneous big acquisitions. Now, as they need dollars to buy oil from more primary sources, they are probably selling because nobody trades in healthy currencies. PM fags do not understand the concept of reserve value at all, and think people would

Only cryptocurrency is:
>discrete
>instantaneous
>universal
>free of government intervention

Now PM fags stand corrected, since they probably would've been better buying Pokémon cards than their rocks.

PM prices are an accurate measure of how much leverage the mentally unwell hold in the economy.

Early replies (first 3)

61930467
>>61930217
>Now that the dust has settled, PMs were all rugged and rock collectors are back to holding bags
Gold and Silver are up >10% YTD while your favorite shitcoin lost a quarter of its value in the same timeframe.

61930516
>fad

61930640
>>61930467
>YTD

Zoom out.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61930789
>>61930640
>Zoom out.
I fail to see how that helps your case.

61931092
>>61930789
Zoom in, goy

61931120
>>61930467
dont worry your useless rocks are going back to $20 soon enough

61931171
Only reason I hold silver is to make kikes like OP seethe
Don't even care about the (((price)))

61931413
>>61931171

If this was true, you wouldn't actually have to hold it. You could just lie on the anonymous image board.

Cope harder, faggot.

61931428
>>61931120
god i hope so, I want a 1 kilo kookaburra so fucking bad

61931494
>>61931413
wrong because the more of us that throw your worthless kike IOUs away for physical value, the more it affects your banks and bottom lines, and the more you panic, shit your pants and cry.
It's absolutely delicious.
>>61931120
>t-two more weeks it'll go back below 70
Those days are LONG gone, Jewie boy

61931632
>>61930217
JP Morgan wanting you rubes to buy his bags

61931693
>>61931494

> implying that there are no other alternatives

lol...nobody cares what you do with your drop in the bucket, faggot.

61932303
>>61931120
blessed
